transform_id.description: Comma-separated list of transform identifiers or wildcard expressions. You can get information for all transforms by using `_all`, by specifying `*` as the `<transform_id>`, or by omitting the `<transform_id>`.

allow_no_match.description: Whether to ignore if a wildcard expression matches no transforms. (This includes `_all` string or when no transforms have been specified)

basic.description: If true, the response includes id, state, node, stats, health, and basic checkpointing information (last and next checkpoint numbers and the next checkpoint's position and progress). Skips statistics that require heavy computations to calculate: operations_behind, changes_last_detected_at, last_search_time, and checkpoint timestamps.

from.description: skips a number of transform stats, defaults to 0

size.description: specifies a max number of transform stats to get, defaults to 100

timeout.description: Controls the time to wait for the stats
